gist.headline: Pocket-sized model lists
gist.blurb: We've polished up the model list for mobile screens. Cleaner rows, better badges, and a shiny new Meta logo for Llama models.
gist.summary: Improved the mobile layout for the model table by pinning score chips, truncating long names, and adding Meta brand logos.
gist.impact: Users browsing models on their phones will see a much cleaner, easier-to-read list with better badge organization.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing a tiny, neat list on a smartphone screen. A Meta logo (infinity symbol) nearby. The robot companion looking at a mobile phone.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing a neat list on a glowing smartphone screen held by the chunky monitor robot. A small pixelated Meta infinity logo sits on a desk nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
